name: telos-ai-forge
description: TELOS ai-forge: a pattern-library-driven forge for AI architectures. Phase A: library substrate + a production-shaped RAG pattern, driven to merge_status:ready over the real gate + Ed25519 ledger + merkle-dag.

scripts.check: node --check pattern.mjs && node --check generators.mjs && node --check breakouts.mjs && node --check forge.mjs && node --check patterns/rag.mjs && node --check checks/check-node.mjs && node --check scripts/test-pattern.mjs && node --check scripts/test-generators.mjs && node --check scripts/test-breakouts.mjs && node --check scripts/test-forge.mjs && node --check live.mjs && node --check scripts/test-live.mjs && node --check workstreams/design-verify.mjs && node --check scripts/test-design-verify.mjs && node --check workstreams/design.mjs && node --check scripts/test-design.mjs && node --check patterns/telos.mjs && node --check scripts/test-telos.mjs && node --check scripts/test-telos-forge.mjs && node --check scripts/test-multiagent.mjs && node --check scripts/test-multiagent-forge.mjs && node --check scripts/test-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/test-eval-forge.mjs && node --check workstreams/catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/test-workstream-catalog.mjs && node --check scripts/test-serving.mjs && node --check scripts/test-serving-forge.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-pattern.mjs && node scripts/test-generators.mjs && node scripts/test-breakouts.mjs && node scripts/test-forge.mjs && node scripts/test-live.mjs && node scripts/test-design-verify.mjs && node scripts/test-design.mjs && node scripts/test-telos.mjs && node scripts/test-telos-forge.mjs && node scripts/test-multiagent.mjs && node scripts/test-multiagent-forge.mjs && node scripts/test-eval.mjs && node scripts/test-eval-forge.mjs && node scripts/test-workstream-catalog.mjs && node scripts/test-serving.mjs && node scripts/test-serving-forge.mjs
